channel.title: Dad Joke of the Day
channel.description: A fresh dad joke every day. Get the app at dadjokes.vip

item.title: What question can never be answered by “Yes”?
item.description:
What question can never be answered by “Yes”?
“Are you asleep?”

item.title: Why are Saturday and Sunday so strong?
item.description:
Why are Saturday and Sunday so strong?
Because the rest are weekdays.

item.title: What goes up but never comes down?
item.description:
What goes up but never comes down?
Your age.

item.title: What can you hold without touching it?
item.description:
What can you hold without touching it?
Your breath.

item.title: What is taken before you get it?
item.description:
What is taken before you get it?
Your picture.

item.title: Ian: My neighbors were screaming and yelling at three o'clock this morning! Mark: Did they wake you?
item.description:
Ian: My neighbors were screaming and yelling at three o'clock this morning! Mark: Did they wake you?
Ian: Nah... I was already up, playing my bagpipes.

item.title: When do knights arrive for sporting events?
item.description:
When do knights arrive for sporting events?
Joust in time.

item.title: Would Little Miss Muffet share her curds?
item.description:
Would Little Miss Muffet share her curds?
No whey.

item.title: What kind of beans won’t grow in a garden?
item.description:
What kind of beans won’t grow in a garden?
Jelly beans.

item.title: Why did the other vegetables like the corn?
item.description:
Why did the other vegetables like the corn?
He was always willing to lend an ear.
